nasb.text: In the house of Israel I have seen a horrible thing; Ephraim’s harlotry is there, Israel has defiled itself.

esv.text: In the house of Israel I have seen a horrible thing; Ephraim’s whoredom is there; Israel is defiled.

cnv.text: 在以色列家！我看見了可怕的事； 那裡有以法蓮的淫行，以色列被玷污了。

ccb.text: 我在以色列家看见了可怕之事， 以法莲不忠不贞，玷污了自己。
